_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

author: doro
content: BATCH-18f F-W2B-016 bookshelf PopupMenu 重组（方案 1 保守 4+5）完成。bookshelf AppBar 留 4 项书架场景高频（manage_groups + import_local + qr_scan + rss_source_manage）；移 5 项到 settings_page 工具段（backup + read_stats + cache_management + rss_favorites + rule_subs，与既有 replace_rules 共置）。router.dart 0 改动（入口位置变更，路径不变）。新增 test/settings_page_test.dart 2 case 验证工具段 6 项 ListTile 存在 + chevron_right。flutter analyze 0 issue；flutter test 404/404 PASS（旧 402 + 新 2）。BATCH-18 路线图 6 条 Flutter finding 全部清完（W2A-001/002/003/008 + W2B-016/022 + 衍生 F-W2A-081 + W1A-055/056）。
